_doc: Return payload contract emitted by runProductCompletionLifecycle(). Validated against buildRunResultPayload() on 2026-03-17.

payload_shape.job: Original job input used for the run.
payload_shape.finalExport: Promotion result and final storage keys.
payload_shape.learning: Learning profile export result from persistLearningProfile() with profileKey, learningRunKey, and merged profile payload.
payload_shape.learningGateResult: Per-field learning gate decisions and acceptedUpdates used to populate learning stores.
payload_shape.categoryBrain: Updated category learning/profile artifact from post-learning updates.
payload_shape.needSet: Late-stage need-driven payload preserved for downstream repair and GUI use.
